title: A Romance of the Little Forest
overview: A story following a botany professor focusing only on research and does not care for fame, money, or love. Meeting a girl he had ill feelings with in the past, their interest in one another develops as she shows off her doctorate knowledge in ornithology.

tv.showTitle: A Romance of the Little Forest
tv.episodeTitle: I Owe You, I Haven't Said I Love You
tv.episodeOverview: Zhuang Yu and Mei Ren are separated in order to accomplish the final business deal. With a Plan B at hand, Zhuang Yu proceeds boldly. An anxious Mei Ren awaits and with their minds in sync, the two pulls off the task. Just when the police crack down the illegal wildlife trading, another danger strikes.
